Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 2 25 25}Ugh, I just can't concentrate. I get so worked up when I picture his face![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 2 25 25}He really did it! He betrayed me! I won't sleep a wink tonight![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}{f 5 13 16 5 113}One of my employees. Maybe I should have seen it coming...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}There was a young man who was working for me... A hard worker who graduated from a distinguished private university.[n]{f 1 1}

{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}But this month, he couldn't meet his sales quota, so I docked his pay. His self-confidence went down the drain.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 2 25 25}What are you talking about!? You should feel sorry for me![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}He's probably cooped up in his home or something now. None of my business.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}I just mailed him a letter of termination, C.O.D.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 2 25 25}It's his fault the company's in the red this month! I've wasted so many resources![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 2 25 25}All those expenses for training, hardware, facilities, labor costs...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}It makes me sick just thinking about the net losses... Argh...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Well, he only worked for me for two years, so at least I won't have to provide a pension...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 2 25 25}Ugh, I better not talk about it, or I'm going to pass out![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}It's difficult growing up with no money...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}You can't even afford shoes for gym class, you know? Going barefoot in the winter is torture![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}I've been thinking... How would you like to model exclusively for my company?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Your innocent appearance would be a perfect camouflage for the ugly realities of business![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Think about it, will ya? Join me, and you'll never have to worry about being shoeless in P.E.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}President Tanaka is[n]starting to open up to me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I understand him a little better now...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Oh, I'd better get going. We're short-staffed now, so I'll have to re-evaluate the budget for next month...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}If I decide to hire someone new, their training is going to cost a fortune.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's getting late, so I'll go back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
